case_title: PAMELA L. WASH VS. SAFEWAY INC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2008 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NASH, PAMELA L. AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NASH, PAMELA L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,385.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2008 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO NOV-12-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506.
